productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girl's Vanida Blue Dungree Infant Kidswear
description: CompositionLight blue dungarees made of 100% thin cotton denim, with aqua green stitch detailing, aqua green polka dotted fabric backing on the straps, belted waist with button closures, two insert pockets on the front, one patch pocket on the back and has an embroidery/graphic embellishment on the frontFittingRegularWash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Get your little one up and about in a pair of dungarees that plays as hard as her, from gini and jony. Team this with a white or pink tee and crocs footwear when you take her out next time. The soft cotton fabric will keep her feeling fresh and comfortable all day long.
